content: We can reframe the Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) of 2025 autonomous agents to use tool-based memory operation as a core curiosity-driven exploration scaffold, where ICM-driven exploration targets uncharacterized regions of the agent's own tool memory instead of just external physical environments. This creates a self-improving loop where the agent's curiosity systematically uncovers forgotten or underutilized tool usage insights, while memory forensics tools can identify gaps and latent threats in accumulated tool memory that the ICM can prioritize for exploration.
